# Lifetime Technology Store

Official domain: https://lifetimetechnology.store
Primary region: Kenya
Primary currency: KES

## Storefront Scope
- Premium electronics and jewelry catalogue
- Product discovery by category, brand, price, and search
- Assisted checkout and WhatsApp support

## Main Categories
- Electronics: smartphones, laptops, watches, audio, tablets, kitchen-accessories, gaming, smart-home
- Jewelry: jewelry (legacy internal slug `jewerlys`), jewelry-necklaces, jewelry-rings, jewelry-bracelets, jewelry-earrings, jewelry-watches

## URL Patterns
- Homepage: https://lifetimetechnology.store/
- Category view: https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}
- Search view: https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}&q={query}
- Product detail (SPA state): https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}&product={product-slug}

## Indexable Pages
- Products: https://lifetimetechnology.store/products
- Categories: https://lifetimetechnology.store/categories
- About: https://lifetimetechnology.store/about
- Contact: https://lifetimetechnology.store/contact
- Track Order: https://lifetimetechnology.store/track-order
- Login: https://lifetimetechnology.store/login
- Blog: https://lifetimetechnology.store/blog
- FAQs: https://lifetimetechnology.store/faqs
- Privacy: https://lifetimetechnology.store/privacy-policy
- Returns: https://lifetimetechnology.store/returns-policy
- Warranty: https://lifetimetechnology.store/warranty-info

## Product Fields
- name
- brand
- category
- price
- original_price
- stock
- description
- specs (key-value)
- variants
- images
- highlights

## Admin
- Catalog management for electronics and jewelry scopes
- Product image URL support with normalization
- Banner and category image controls
- Footer admin entry label: `Shemi` (opens admin access panel)

## Footer Navigation
- Shop: Mobile Collection, Computing Hub, Wearables Corner, Audio Lounge, Tablet Center, Kitchen Tech, Gaming Arena, Jewelry Picks, Necklace Studio
- Support: Track Order, Returns Policy, Warranty Info, Contact Us, FAQs
- Company: About Us, Careers, Press, Partners, Privacy Policy

## Mini Blog Topics
- Smartphone buying guide
- Laptop checklist guide
- Jewelry care guide
- Gaming setup tips

## Support Actions
- Track order routes users to checkout timeline
- Contact support routes users to WhatsApp support
- Returns, warranty, FAQs, and company links update the footer blog/about panel with guidance
